session.user: Run ruff check and ruff format on the new test files and report results. Commands: 1. `ruff check --fix tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_preprocess_session/` 2. `ruff format tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_preprocess_session/` Report all output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check and format commands on the new test files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check with --fix on test files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format on test files

session.assistant:
**ruff check** passed: Found 5 errors (all fixed, 0 remaining).
**ruff format** passed: 9 files left unchanged (already properly formatted).
Both commands completed successfully. The ruff check fixed 5 errors in the test files, and the format check confirms the files are now properly formatted.
